case_title: THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC A CORP vs. DOUBLE "L" PAVING INC., A CORP

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1993, CONTINUED TO JAN-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
